nasb.text: Then it sprouted and became a low, spreading vine with its branches turned toward him, but its roots remained under it. So it became a vine and yielded shoots and sent out branches.

esv.text: and it sprouted and became a low spreading vine, and its branches turned toward him, and its roots remained where it stood. So it became a vine and produced branches and put out boughs.

cnv.text: 它生長起來，成了一棵矮小而蔓延的葡萄樹；樹上的枝子向著那鷹，樹根在牠以下。這樣，它就成了一棵葡萄樹，生出枝子，長出嫩芽。

ccb.text: 树苗很快发了芽，成了向四面蔓延的矮小葡萄树，根深叶茂，枝子向着鹰伸展开去。
